metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won revenue is ahead of goal by $1,250,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $3,250,000 in closed-won sales against a $2,000,000 goal — the team is ahead of target by $1,250,000, reaching 162.5% of attainment.

cards.title: Goal exceeded
cards.body: Closed-won sales of $3,250,000 surpass the $2,000,000 goal by $1,250,000, landing at 162.5% attainment. Three opportunities have reached Closed Won status.

cards.title: Pipeline health
cards.body: The validated export contains 12 opportunities totaling $8,780,000, with $6,152,500 in weighted pipeline and $4,840,000 still open.

cards.title: Regional concentration
cards.body: West is the largest region at $4,410,000 across 4 opportunities, led by the Strategic segment.

cards.title: Follow-up queue
cards.body: 2 open opportunities have not been updated in 21+ days and are flagged for review.
